title: Open Vault API
description:
**Using Basware Vault APIs**
1. Prepare a document that will be archived by zipping all the document related files into a single ZIP file.
2. POST the document metadata first. This will return a pre-signed URL as well as a document identifier (bumId).
3. PUT the ZIP file to the URL received in step 1. Note: This PUT operation requires no authentication as it is using a pre-signed URL.
4. GET the status of the uploaded document using the bumId identifier received in step 2 (optional).
The pre-signed URL is valid for 15 minutes. When the ZIP file is uploaded with 200 OK response, the file is in queue to be archived.

clientUUID.description: Document identifier created by client. Unique ID in client's namespace. It is returned in the response as a correlation ID. Not to be confused with the documentId (eg invoice number).

documentType.description: Specifies document type. Either Invoice, CreditNote, InvoiceSelfBilled or CreditNoteSelfBilled.

senderName.description: Name of the document sender. For invoice, supplier name.

senderIds.description: Array of IDs identifying the sender. Total size of the array should not exceed: 300 chars

recipientName.description: Name of the document recipient. For invoice, receiving company's name.

recipientIds.description: Array of IDs identifying the recipient. Total size of the array should not exceed: 300 chars

tradingPartner.description: Name of the document recipient or sender. For invoice, receiving company's name or supplier name.

documentDate.description: Date of the document. For invoice, normally invoice date. ISO 8601

documentId.description: Document identifier. For invoice, normally invoice number. Is not required to be unique but this will be used in search criteria, so it helps if they are easily identifiable using a compound search (documentId + senderId).

currencyCode.description: 3 digit currency code of the document. ISO 4217

buyerReferenceId.description: An identifier assigned by the Buyer used for internal routing purposes.

buyerReferenceType.description: Type of buyerReferenceId. Freetext field. eg. email, name, VAT

amount.description: Amount of document. For invoice, use net sum.

flowDirection.description: Document flow direction. Either sending or receiving.

bumId.description: Unique identifier of the document. Issued by Basware

documentId.description: Document identifier. For invoice, normally invoice number.

clientUUID.description: Unique identifier as passed on the request for correlation

documentId.description: Document identifier. For invoice, normally invoice number.

clientUUID.description: Unique identifier as passed on the request for correlation

lastUpdated.description: Date and time of the last status update.

message.description: Additional status message in exception cases. For example if file is not found in staging area in 15 minutes.

amount.description: Amount of document. For invoice, use net sum.

archiveDate.description: Archive date of the document. ISO 8601

buyerReferenceId.description: An identifier assigned by the Buyer used for internal routing purposes.

buyerReferenceType.description: Type of buyerReferenceId. Freetext field. eg. email, name, VAT

currencyCode.description: 3 digit currency code of the document. ISO 4217

documentDate.description: Date of the document. For invoice, normally invoice date. ISO 8601

documentId.description: Document identifier. For invoice, normally invoice number. Is not required to be unique but this will be used in search criteria, so it helps if they are easily identifiable using a compound search (documentId + senderId).

documentType.description: Specifies document type. Either Invoice, CreditNote, InvoiceSelfBilled or CreditNoteSelfBilled.

recipientIds.description: Array of IDs identifying the recipient. Total size of the array should not exceed: 300 chars

recipientName.description: Name of the document recipient. For invoice, receiving company's name.

senderIds.description: Array of IDs identifying the sender. Total size of the array should not exceed: 300 chars

senderName.description: Name of the document sender. For invoice, supplier name.

tradingPartner.description: Name of the document recipient or sender. For invoice, receiving company's name or supplier name.
